attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WPNO.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
WPNO.LINE_ID,
WPNO.GLOBAL_NAME,
WPNO.PRODUCT_KEY ,
WPNO.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ,
WPNO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ,
WPNO.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT ,
CATID.CATEGORY_ID 
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_PRNTQ_NSOLT_ORGID WPNO
LEFT OUTER JOIN
$$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES CATID /* Replaced ETLONLYDB.EL_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES with GGSRC table as part of Q1FY14 SJPROD sunset*/
ON
WPNO.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = CATID.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
AND WPNO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = CATID.ORGANIZATION_ID
AND CATID.CATEGORY_SET_ID = 93

SELECT 
SOXOL.LINE_ID,
SOXOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE21,
SOXOL.DISPATCH_DATE ,
SOXOL.DISPATCH_RESULT_CODE,
SOXOL.CONTRACT_QUOTE_NUMBER,  
SOXOL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
SOXOL.CREATED_BY,                    
SOXOL.CREATION_DATE,
SOXOL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
SOXOL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SOXOL.BATCH_ID,              
SOXOL.CREATE_DATETIME,
SOXOL.ACTION_CODE,               
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY,                   
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
GOODS_LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /* Release8.0*/
SOXOL.RECEIVABLE_INTF_DATE AS ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM, /* Release8.0*/
SOXOL.RECEIVABLE_INTF_RESULT_CODE AS ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD, /* Release8.0*/
NGPB.BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY , /*REL 8 AM CHANGES*/
NGPB.CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY, /*REL 8 AM CHANGES*/
SOXOL.SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER,   /* ICW */
SOXOL.DELIVERY_OPTION,   /* ICW */
SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE6,    /* ICW */
SOXOL.TAA,    /* TAA */
COALESCE(SOXOL.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG,'N'), /*CDO SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENTS(QUICK WIN)*/
SOXOL.FLEXIBLE_SERVICE_START_DATE, /*Services SCM SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENTS(QUICK WIN)*/
SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE25 ,/* As a Part Of ERP in Revenue Attribution For Q3FY13*/
SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE23/*Added aa part off SALES_ORDER_LINE changes August release,2014*/,
SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE14, /*ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGES Q2FY15 */
SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE7
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINES_EX SOXOL
INNER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT /* changed the table name from N_SALES_ORDER_LINE TO N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV as part of DPT code changes */
ON
(SOXOL.LINE_ID = NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN SOXOL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' 
          WHEN SOXOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END = NSOLT.SS_CODE)
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   GOODS_LINE
ON  (CAST (GOODS_LINE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AS VARCHAR(150))= SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE12 
AND GOODS_LINE.SS_CODE=(CASE WHEN SOXOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
WHEN SOXOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
END)) /* changed the table name from N_SALES_ORDER_LINE TO N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV as part of DPT code changes*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NSOLT.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_GOODS_PRODUCT_BUNDLE NGPB /*REL 8 AM CHANGES*/
ON SOXOL.ATTRIBUTE20=NGPB.SK_BUNDLE_MAPPING_ID_INT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SOXOL.LINE_ID,SOXOL.GLOBAL_NAME
  ORDER BY SOXOL.CREATE_DATETIME DESC )  =1

SELECT
WPNMC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
WPNMC.LINE_ID,
WPNMC.GLOBAL_NAME,
WPNMC.PRODUCT_KEY ,
WPNMC.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ,
WPNMC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ,
WPNMC.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT ,
WPNMC.CATEGORY_ID ,
CAST(WPNMC.SEGMENT3 AS INTEGER),
WPNMC.CATEGORY_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS DEPARTMENT_CODE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_PRNTQ_NSOLT_MF_CATID  	WPNMC
/* Removed as part of SJPROD Sunset Q1FY14 - BOM_DEPARTMENTS will not be available in CG1
LEFT OUTER JOIN
$$STGDB.ST_MF_BOM_DEPARTMENTS DEPT
ON
WPNMC.SEGMENT3 = DEPT.DEPARTMENT_ID
AND DEPARTMENT_CLASS_CODE = 'MFG' AND WPNMC.GLOBAL_NAME='US'*/

SELECT
EOOOLE.LINE_ID  ,                     
EOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE21  ,                 
EOOOLE.DISPATCH_DATE  ,               
EOOOLE.DISPATCH_RESULT_CODE , 
EOOOLE.CONTRACT_QUOTE_NUMBER, 
EOOOLE.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,              
EOOOLE.CREATED_BY  ,                  
EOOOLE.CREATION_DATE ,                
EOOOLE.LAST_UPDATED_BY  ,             
EOOOLE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE12, /*Release8.0*/
EOOOLE.RECEIVABLE_INTF_RESULT_CODE,  /*Release8.0*/
EOOOLE.RECEIVABLE_INTF_DATE, /*Release8.0*/          
EOOOLE.BATCH_ID ,                     
EOOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
EOOOLE.ACTION_CODE,
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE20,      /*Release8.0*  AM Changes*/  
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE5,
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE1,
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE2,
EOOOLE.SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER ,   /* ICW */
EOOOLE.DELIVERY_OPTION,   /* ICW */
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE6 ,   /* ICW */
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE4,
EOOOLE.TAA,    /* TAA */
EOOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG, /*CDO SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENTS (QUICK WIN)*/
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE25, /*As a Part of ERP in Revenue 
Attribution for Q3FY13*/
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE23/*Added as part of SALES_ORDER_LINES August release 2014*/,
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE14, /* Added as part of CSSO CHANGES Q2FY15*/
EOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE7
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINES_EX EOOOLE
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINES_EX  SOOOLE
WHERE SOOOLE.LINE_ID=EOOOLE.LINE_ID AND SOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME=EOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT
WPNC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
WPNC.LINE_ID,
WPNC.GLOBAL_NAME,
WPNC.PRODUCT_KEY ,
WPNC.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ,
WPNC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ,
WPNC.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT ,
WPNC.CATEGORY_ID ,
CATID.SEGMENT3,
CATID.CATEGORY_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_PRNTQ_NSOLT_CATID  WPNC
LEFT OUTER JOIN
$$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_MTL_CATEGORIES_B  CATID        /* Replaced ETLONLYDB.EL_MF_MTL_CATEGORIES_B as part of SJPROD Sunset Q1FY14*/
ON
WPNC.CATEGORY_ID = CATID.CATEGORY_ID

SELECT
          NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
          SOOOL.LINE_ID,
          SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
          NSOL_ASSEM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY,
          NSOL_SPLIT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
          SOOOL.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE AS SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID,
COALESCE(SOOOL.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG, '='), /* ICW */ 
COALESCE(NSOL_LINK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -999) AS RU_CONFIG_PRNT_SLS_ORDR_LN_KEY,
COALESCE(NSOL_TOP_MODEL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -999) AS DD_TOP_MODEL_SLS_ORDR_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SOOOL.SHIPPABLE_FLAG,'N') AS SHIPPABLE_FLAG
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL   SOOOL
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_ASSEM
ON  (NSOL_ASSEM.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SOOOL.ATO_LINE_ID 
AND NSOL_ASSEM.SS_CODE=(CASE WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
END) )/* changed the table name from N_SALES_ORDER_LINE TO N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV as part of DPT code changes */
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_SPLIT
ON  (NSOL_SPLIT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SOOOL.SPLIT_FROM_LINE_ID 
AND NSOL_SPLIT.SS_CODE=(CASE WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
END))/* changed the table name from N_SALES_ORDER_LINE TO N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV as part of DPT code changes */
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL
ON  (NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SOOOL.LINE_ID 
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=(CASE WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV'
END))/* changed the table name from N_SALES_ORDER_LINE TO N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV as part of DPT code changes */
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_LINK
ON  (NSOL_LINK.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SOOOL.LINK_TO_LINE_ID 
AND NSOL_LINK.SS_CODE=(CASE WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END))
LEFT  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV   NSOL_TOP_MODEL
ON  (NSOL_TOP_MODEL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= SOOOL.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID 
AND NSOL_TOP_MODEL.SS_CODE=(CASE WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC' 
WHEN SOOOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END))

SELECT 
EOOOLA.LINE_ID,                       
EOOOLA.LINE_NUMBER ,                  
EOOOLA.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
EOOOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,               
EOOOLA.OPTION_NUMBER   ,              
EOOOLA.GES_UPDATE_DATE  ,             
EOOOLA.CREATED_BY        ,            
EOOOLA.CREATION_DATE      ,           
EOOOLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY     ,          
EOOOLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE     ,         
EOOOLA.ATO_LINE_ID           ,  /* Release8.0*/          
EOOOLA.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE   , /* Release8.0*/          
EOOOLA.SPLIT_FROM_LINE_ID      , /* Release8.0*/      
EOOOLA.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG     ,   /* ICW */     
 EOOOLA.BATCH_ID                  ,    
EOOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME            ,   
EOOOLA.ACTION_CODE  ,
EOOOLA.LINK_TO_LINE_ID  ,
EOOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID,
EOOOLA.SHIPPABLE_FLAG     ,
EOOOLA.PRICING_QUANTITY       
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL EOOOLA
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL   SOOOLA
WHERE SOOOLA.LINE_ID=EOOOLA.LINE_ID 
       AND SOOOLA.GLOBAL_NAME=EOOOLA.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT
	      WISOLE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
	      WISOLE.LINE_ID ,
	      WISOLE.GLOBAL_NAME ,
	      WISOLE.PRODUCT_KEY ,
	      WISOLE.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE ,
	      NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ,
	      WISOLE.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
	      WISOLE.FLEXIBLE_SERVICE_START_DATE
FROM 
	$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINES_EX WISOLE
INNER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON
NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=WISOLE.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
